details.heading: Ships in product packaging
details.content: This item has been tested to certify it can ship safely in its original box or bag to avoid unnecessary packaging. Since 2015, we have reduced the weight of outbound packaging per shipment by 41% on average, that’s over 2 million tons of packaging material.If you still require Amazon packaging for this item, choose "Ship in Amazon packaging" at checkout. about_item: DOG TRAVEL BAG BACKPACK: This airline approved dog bag for traveling is functionally perfect for dog mom and dad. Whether you're going on an overnight road trip, or just need to go on a walk, hike, camping, this bag kit has got you covered. Airline compliant and fits under most airplane seats. Features spacious inner compartment, built-in adjustable flap, multiple functional pockets and poop bag dispenser, this dog suitcase is the perfect weekend getaway gear with your best friend.

PET SUPPLIES DOG DIAPER BAG: The dog travel backpack helps dog owners easily organize treats, kibbles, toys, leashes, and all other pet accessories and training supplies. The doggie traveling backpack comes with two food containers and two collapsible silicone dog bowls, ensuring that your pet is well-fed and hydrated during your hiking camping trip. Each food container has a 4L capacity, making it a camping gear must have for all small, medium, and large size dogs and cats.

DOG CAMPING ESSENTIALS WITH POOP BAG DISPENSER: This puppy travel bag for dog is designed to provide you with the most convenient travel experience with your pet. With the built-in poop bag dispenser kit, the dog supply bag tote allows you to conveniently reach for a waste bag in times of emergency. This pet travel bookbag will be the best travel gear for puppy essentials storage during camping, traveling, road trip and beach. Take your dog for a trip with confidence and peace of mind!

DURABLE PUPPY TRAVEL SUITCASE: Made with high-grade polyester and water-repellent oxford outer material with PVC backing, this pet travel bag luggage is versatile for beach, boating, camping weekender. Dog supply carrier features a leak-proof inner lining, ensuring that your pet's food and supplies stay secure and dry. The back and shoulder straps are equipped with extra thick padding for comfort during long trips. The backpack comes with both waist and chest buckles to give you extra support.

DOGGIE TRAVEL ACCESSORIES GIFT: This pet travel bag equipment measures 13 x 8 x 16 inches (L x W x H), providing a large 27L volume to store all your furry friend’s essentials and gadgets. The dog gift basket is a must have stuff on the new dog shopping list, making it a great dog storage organizer present for dog mom, dad, parents, owners and trainers. The dog pack backpack is especially ideal for going for a walk, beach, hiking, camping or any other outdoor activities.

summary.text: Customers find this pet carrier spacious, holding up to 4 days' worth of food, with two small bags for food and room for more items. The bag features handy compartments and large outside pockets, making it perfect for traveling with dogs, including hiking and day trips. Customers praise its durability, functionality, and capacity, with one mentioning it fits a small softside cooler, and consider it well-made for the price.

authors_reviews.title: Makes for the perfect diaper bag
authors_reviews.text: I know that this is supposed to be a dog travel backpack, however, this made for THE BEST diaper bag! I went through multiple diaper bags and none of them checked off all of my boxes on what I wanted in a diaper bag until I found this one! Great quality, inexpensive, very large on the inside, and had many pockets. I definitely recommend it!
authors_reviews.author: Stephanie

authors_reviews.title: Quality Item
authors_reviews.text: This is a really nice set, though we don't know about wear and tear yet, I can say it is pretty solid right out of the packaging. It has plenty of space for everything that you need and accessibility is really good.
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: Great buy!
authors_reviews.text: I got this for a trip we planned to keep all of our dog's stuff in one place. It worked great. Before we would just fit her stuff in other luggage as we could. I love that it comes with the foldable cups which we used at the hotel we stayed at. The containers to keep her food and treats in we're awesome as well. It's a very large bag and held everything we needed to take. I love that our dog now has her own little"luggage" to take on trips. On our road trip it made stops easier as we knew where everything was for her. We packed the food containers, foldable cups, a full size throw blanket, some toys, and extra poop bags and still had plenty of room to add more. It's a very sturdy, large bag that's easy to carry. I got the purple and it's a great color.
authors_reviews.author: Itsme

authors_reviews.title: Good quality
authors_reviews.text: Worked perfectly for traveling with my 2 dogs! Each bag held 14 cups of food, so 7 days worth of food for both my dogs. Came super easy to set up, I was able to put all the leashes, harnesses and bowls inside. I just want to add some patches with the dog’s name on it!
authors_reviews.author: Rachell Fields

authors_reviews.title: Excellent travel bag
authors_reviews.text: This bag hold all the items I needed for traveling with two cats. It gets heavy so I was happy that it was a backpack.
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: Great size for a good price
authors_reviews.text: This dog bag is perfect! It has a lot of space and storage inside! It holds his dog mat, bowls, dog food, a couple of toys, leash, collar, harness, medicine, treats and shampoo. I travel a lot with my dog and this bag has been perfect for fitting all his belongings in there and packaging.
authors_reviews.author: Bri

authors_reviews.title: Decent Quality, Ugly Packaging
authors_reviews.text: I think my biggest beef with this is the way its packaged makes it less giftable as-is. I ended up taking all of the pieces out of the package and putting them into a larger basket of dog related items for my step-dad. Since he travels with at least one of their dogs to his cabin in the woods in northern MI, I thought this would be useful. It's a good size and feels sturdy.
authors_reviews.author: jess

authors_reviews.title: good bag with lots of space
authors_reviews.text: great bag with lots of storage. i am able to fit my dog’s food, toys, and bowls in there.
authors_reviews.author: Kassi

other_countries_reviews.title: A mochila é muito espaçosa
other_countries_reviews.text: A mochila superou todas as minhas expectativas! É absurdamente espaçosa e versátil. Consegui colocar tudo que meu filho cachorro precisa para uma viagem confortável: manta, brinquedos de pelúcia, mini travesseiro e duas frasqueiras – uma para ração e outra para petiscos. Ainda tem bolsos laterais perfeitos para garrafas de água, dois bolsos superiores com zíper onde coloquei a carteira de vacinação, e mais um bolso atrás para itens pessoais. A organização é impecável, e a cor é simplesmente deslumbrante, um azul lindíssimo! Mesmo com tudo isso, ainda sobrou espaço! É ideal para quem gosta de viajar com o pet e precisa de praticidade sem abrir mão do estilo. Já testei várias bolsas e mochilas, mas essa é, sem dúvida, a número 1. Nada supera a qualidade, o design e a funcionalidade dela! Eu indico 100% essa compra, agora não preciso levar todas as coisas do Beckham (mini salsicha modelo da foto 🤣) espalhadas pelo carro. E para quem quiser deixar o cachorro em hospedagem, eu literalmente deixei a mochila com eles sem me preocupar de ter esquecido alguma coisa. Coube tudo!
other_countries_reviews.author: Analú

other_countries_reviews.title: Hunderucksack
other_countries_reviews.text: Der Rucksack ist super für ein Urlaub mit Hund mann hat immer alles gut dabei
other_countries_reviews.author: Andrea Hessemer

other_countries_reviews.title: Algo decepcionada
other_countries_reviews.text: Funciona como bolsa de almacenaje para las cosas de mi mascota. Los tirantes son muy pequeños e incómodos para toda la carga. Poco práctica pero funciona, aunque los detalles denotan una calidad media/baja. Me parece algo cara para lo que es ya que no parece resistir mucho peso ni es cómoda para cargar o caminar.
other_countries_reviews.author: Ari Sandoval

other_countries_reviews.title: Increíble mochila para mascotas!
other_countries_reviews.text: La capacidad es increíbleLa resistencia es excelenteLa comodidad magnífica y los platos completamente útiles
other_countries_reviews.author: Luis Rodrigo

other_countries_reviews.title: excelente bolsa de viaje
other_countries_reviews.text: tiene un tamaño perfecto donde puedes guardar todos los artículos de tu mascota, también esta muy bonita, me encanto el color.
other_countries_reviews.author: martha leticia
